scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "mockup" ]; then npm run web:mockup; else npm run full; fi' --
scripts.setup:core: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:15432/eventdb_foremoz npm --prefix ../eventdb run db:schema && npm --prefix ./apps/api run db:read-model
scripts.full: sh -c 'DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:15432/eventdb_foremoz npm --prefix ../eventdb run dev & EVENTDB_PID=$!; npm --prefix ./apps/api run dev & API_PID=$!; VITE_APP_MODE=full VITE_MOCKUP_OPEN_ACCESS=false npm --prefix ./apps/vite run dev; kill $EVENTDB_PID $API_PID 2>/dev/null || true'
